narrative:
The Zurich Zebras are positioned for a high-output offensive performance today, anchored by Trea Turner and Christian Yelich, who lead the board with projections of 82.90 and 81.68 respectively. Turner benefits significantly from a favorable platoon split against southpaw Foster Griffin and a prime leadoff spot, while Yelich leverages a +14% boost from his spot in the three-hole and a strong BvP track record. Junior Caminero also remains a high-floor anchor in the cleanup spot, offering elite plate appearance quality against Kyle Harrison to drive our 5x5 Roto upside.

Efficiency concerns center on the catcher position, where both Dillon Dingler and Logan O'Hoppe face tough individual matchups that keep their projections in the low 40s; however, O’Hoppe’s +5% boost due to a sluggish opposing battery keeps him viable for category depth. While Yordan Alvarez and Kyle Schwarber face L/L platoon penalties, their elite base talent and high-leverage order spots necessitate starting them despite the suboptimal matchup against Ranger Suarez and Foster Griffin. We will monitor final lineup cards closely, as any shuffle in the batting order will directly impact the scoring projections for these bottom-third volatility plays.
